accessDenied.description: The page you tried to access is not available for your role.
accessDenied.impersonateHint: As Super Admin, you must impersonate a company to access its data. Go to Companies and select the company you want to manage.

announcements.maintenanceDesc: Blocks write operations for non-SuperAdmin users

announcements.dismissibleLabel: Allow users to dismiss this announcement
announcements.maintenanceWarning: This type will activate maintenance mode. Write operations will be blocked for all users except SuperAdmin.
